note: Frozen live state; superseded items deliberately absent. Authored before the harness.

active_claims.what: upstream schema drift is real (three event fields changed last quarter), so the pipeline must validate schemas

active_constraints.what: raw events are retained for 30 days, not indefinitely

decisions.what: use a streaming pipeline; the nightly-batch design was dropped

open_conflicts.what: processing guarantee: analytics wants exactly-once vs SRE wants at-least-once

open_questions.what: whether to backfill the last 90 days into the new pipeline
